summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GuessIt Football Prediction Platform clone. All critical backend APIs and frontend pages working correctly. Admin authentication successful with provided credentials.

minor_notes.impact: Expected - No Football API key configured

passed_tests: Backend health check (/api/health) returns healthy status
API root (/api/) returns 'GuessIt API is running'
Admin login works with admin@guessit.com / Admin123!
Subscription plans (/api/subscriptions/plans) returns 3 plans: Standard, Champion, Elite
Homepage loads with GuessIt branding, navigation, match tabs, league filters
Frontend login page (/login) renders with all required elements
Frontend register page (/register) renders with all required elements
Leaderboard page (/leaderboard) loads with 'Global Leaderboard' title
About page (/about) loads with 'About GuessIt' title
News page (/news) loads with 'Latest News' title
Contact page (/contact) loads with 'Get in Touch' title
